landing.title: Services
landing.subtitle: Professional solutions for your digital needs
landing.description: From channel management to custom development, I offer a range of services to help you grow your online presence and achieve your goals.
landing.channelManagementDescription: Social media management and content strategy for creators and businesses
landing.pcOptimizationDescription: Performance tuning, hardware recommendations, and system optimization
landing.affiliateDescription: Affiliate marketing strategies and niche site development
landing.iqTestDescription: Cognitive assessment platform with detailed analytics

approach.title: My Approach
approach.qualityFirstText: Quality is at the core of everything I deliver. Each service undergoes rigorous testing and refinement before reaching you.
approach.tailoredSolutionsText: No two projects are the same. I take time to understand your unique needs and craft solutions that fit perfectly.
approach.resultsDrivenText: Every service is designed with measurable outcomes in mind, ensuring you see real value from our collaboration.
